creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Hopping on this transition trend! 🥰

We’re finally on a REAL staycation… in a beach hotel, not in the hospital! 🥹 Happy to report that this girl who can barely walk a few months ago can now run and hop! 🙏🏻

We booked this stay at @rovehotels La Mer during the 99 AED promotion; influenced by @micobanua! Na budol na naman kami ni Mico. 😂 Anyway, it was such a great deal and we’re loving every bit of our stay.

#ladyandhersweetescapes #dubai #staycation #dubaihotel #dubaibeach #dubaireels #mydubai

transcription.text: I don't know which way to go You kiss the limpy fire Like the sweet song of a fire You light my morning sky Burning up Ooh, I feel my temperature rising
